overall.description: A nighttime walk through a rainy suburban neighborhood in a video game (GTA V). The camera moves along a wet sidewalk past a brick retaining wall, street lamps, and palm trees while vehicles pass by on the road. The scene features heavy rainfall, artificial street lighting, and a dark, atmospheric residential setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with brick retaining wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk next to a brick wall in the rain, approaching a distant vehicle

notable_agents.action: yellow sedan approaching slowly from the distance with headlights on

entered.detail: red brick wall running along the right side of the sidewalk with concrete cap
textured palm tree trunk close to the sidewalk edge
ornate black street lamp post with circular base illuminating the rain
suburban houses with warm lit windows visible through the trees across the road

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a rain-soaked residential sidewalk at night. A brick retaining wall runs along the right side while palm trees and street lamps line the left. In the distance, a yellow sedan approaches on the wet road, its headlights cutting through the heavy rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street corner with passing traffic

events.description: yellow sedan passes by on the left side of the road
black SUV passes by on the left side of the road following the yellow car

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk as the brick wall ends, navigating past passing vehicles on the wet road

notable_agents.action: yellow sedan driving past on the road, illuminating the wet pavement with headlights
black SUV following behind the yellow car on the rainy street

entered.detail: bright yellow four-door sedan with headlights on, driving on the wet asphalt
dark colored sport utility vehicle following the yellow sedan
yellow fire hydrant on the grass verge near the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: As the brick wall ends, the sidewalk opens up to a grassy verge. The camera passes a yellow sedan and then a black SUV driving on the rain-slicked road. A yellow fire hydrant becomes visible on the left as the walk continues toward the corner, with street lamps now visible in the distance on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a rain-soaked residential sidewalk that transitions from a confined path beside a brick wall to an open street corner. It begins with the camera moving past a brick retaining wall on the right and palm trees on the left, while a yellow sedan approaches through the heavy rain. As the brick wall ends, the sidewalk opens up to a grassy verge, allowing the camera to pass the yellow sedan and a black SUV gliding across the slick road. The scene then shifts toward the corner, passing a yellow fire hydrant on the left before turning toward distant street lamps illuminating the right side of the road.
